articles.title: Royal Rebuke? King Charles Counters Trump Narrative on NATO
articles.description: King Charles III addressed the US Congress, emphasising the significance of alliances and NATO's unity post-9/11. He also called for unwavering support for Ukraine, highlighting the need for collective defense.

articles.title: James Comey Indicted Again For 'Targeting' Trump
articles.description: Former FBI Director James Comey was indicted over a seashell photo reading “86 47,” which officials said threatened President Donald Trump. The image, posted with a casual caption, was interpreted by critics as slang implying harm toward Trump, who is the 47th president.

articles.title: AI-based traffic system to curb violations and accidents in state
articles.description: In an ambitious move to tackle traffic woes, Bihar is rolling out a cutting-edge Intelligent Traffic Management System. This innovative initiative will harness AI technology, Automatic Number Plate Recognition (ANPR) cameras, and smart signaling to alleviate congestion and reduce accidents. With the deployment of over 500 cameras to monitor infractions, the system will issue electronic fines to encourage rule adherence.

articles.title: V-Guard launches Zivardo 100 Air Cooler: Specs and features
articles.description: V-Guard unveils the Zivardo 100, a powerful new air cooler designed for large Indian spaces. Featuring a 100-litre tank, 20-meter air throw, and antifungal honeycomb pads, it promises efficient cooling even in challenging summers. Its hard water-resistant pump and user-friendly features ensure durability and ease of use, backed by a solid warranty and extensive service network.

articles.title: Speeding car mows down 3 in Munger, driver flees
articles.description: Tragedy struck Munger as a speeding car, losing control, fatally struck three mechanics repairing a truck. The horrific accident near a fuel station claimed lives instantly, leaving locals enraged and blocking the main road. Police are actively searching for the absconding driver, with the Chief Minister announcing ex-gratia for the victims' families.

articles.title: India fast-tracks Canada FTA, GCC talks paused, says Piyush Goyal
articles.description: India is pushing forward with trade deals. Negotiations for a free trade agreement with Canada are speeding up. Talks are also underway with Chile and Peru. However, discussions with the Gulf Cooperation Council have been temporarily halted due to the ongoing conflict in West Asia. India plans to waive intellectual property fees for sporting goods for three years.

articles.title: 'Topper of my class, still no job': Graduate spent over Rs 1 crore on UK degree, applied to 500 jobs, got fewer than 20 interviews
articles.description: UK graduate job crisis: A 21-year-old graduate’s struggle to find a job in the UK has gone viral, highlighting the growing challenges in the graduate job market. Khaled Sharif, a top-performing student from Kingston University, has applied to nearly 500 jobs but received fewer than 20 interview calls. Despite spending over ₹1 crore on his education, he remains unemployed and has expanded his search beyond his field. He attributes the situation to an oversupply of graduates, reduced hiring, and increasing competition, while also suspecting that misconceptions about his work eligibility may be affecting his chances.

articles.title: Karnataka education department bars 'obscene songs' during school events
articles.description: School rules Karnataka: Education Department bars obscene songs at annual day and cultural events, directing schools to pick patriotic and value-based music, with action against heads and management for violations across state institutions.

A silence period is in effect until 6:00 PM on April 29, prohibiting election content on media platforms. Exit polls for multiple states are slated for release on April 29 after 6:30 PM, with vote counting scheduled for May 4.

articles.title: Pritam gets candid as ‘Gangster’ clocks 20 years, talks about missing KK and Zubeen Garg: 'I was so broken down'
articles.description: Composer Pritam reflects on the enduring music of 'Gangster' as it marks two decades. He shares poignant memories of collaborating with late singers KK and Zubeen Garg, revealing the deep emotional toll of performing their iconic songs. Pritam discusses his personal ways of coping with loss, highlighting how the film's soundtrack evokes cherished friendships and irreplaceable voices.

articles.title: Vinesh Phogat Row: WFI denies fresh allegations, says 'she should focus on wrestling'
articles.description: Vinesh Phogat claimed she couldn’t register for a tournament, but WFI chief Sanjay Singh denied it, saying her registration was complete and accused her of creating unnecessary controversy. The event runs May 10–12. Vinesh, eyeing a comeback after her Olympic setback and disqualification, now faces fresh tension ahead of her return.

articles.title: George Clooney supports Jimmy Kimmel as Donald Trump demands he be fired: ‘Jokes are jokes’
articles.description: Hollywood star George Clooney has defended Jimmy Kimmel amidst a firestorm over a joke about Melania Trump. Clooney contrasted Kimmel's comedy with potentially dangerous political rhetoric, highlighting concerns about heated discourse. The controversy erupted after a clip of Kimmel's joke resurfaced following an incident at the White House Correspondents' Dinner, drawing sharp criticism from President Trump and Melania Trump herself.

articles.title: Quote of the Day by James Baldwin: “A child cannot be taught without respect” — lessons on honesty, education, trust, and emotional understanding by one of the most powerful voices on race and society in the 20th century
articles.description: James Baldwin shares a powerful idea about teaching and truth. His quote shows that children need respect and honesty to learn properly. It explains how emotions and trust play a big role in education. His words still guide teachers, parents, and young people to build better understanding and real learning.

articles.title: AAP MLA Mehraj Malik released from Kathua jail after HC quashes PSA case
articles.description: Jammu and Kashmir Aam Aadmi Party president Mehraj Malik was released from Kathua Jail. The Jammu & Kashmir and Ladakh High Court quashed the Public Safety Act case against him. Supporters welcomed Malik with joy. The High Court set aside the detention order passed by the Deputy Commissioner. This decision came after concluding all proceedings of the case.

articles.title: ‘90 Minutes Behind Closed Doors’: Araghchi Reveals 'Constructive 'Putin Talks Amid Iran Crisis
articles.description: Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi held extended talks with Russian President Vladimir Putin in Saint Petersburg covering war, regional tensions and future strategic cooperation. Araghchi called the meeting highly constructive and said Putin praised the Iranian people for resisting the United States and prevailing in an unjust war. Tehran thanked Moscow for wartime support and pledged deeper strategic ties under new conditions. Russia also promised efforts toward Middle East peace.#Putin #Iran #Russia #Araghchi #BreakingNews #WorldNews #MiddleEast #Geopolitics #Tehran #Moscow #SaintPetersburg #RussiaIran #LiveNews #PutinNews #IranNews
